statement: Fixed/custom task date — If a task is unlinked, it becomes a fixed/custom calendar date and — Task date object, TaskEditor, date display logic, validation.
affected_modules: src/types/; src/services/api-mappers.ts; src/utils/date.helpers.ts; src/utils/node.helpers.ts; DTO/domain/builder mapping
ux_impact: User can intentionally lock a task date.
